configuration.survivorship_bias_note: Uses the current 125-stock institutional-core universe across historical dates; historical constituent changes are not reconstructed.
configuration.lookahead_control: Each signal uses only the trailing window ending on T0; execution and outcomes start from the next trading day.
configuration.p1_policy_note: Failed Breakout, Second Leg traps, setup observations and confirmed-entry stages are evaluated separately; thresholds are unchanged.

evaluation_readiness.warning: Do not lower gates solely from groups below 30 completed samples. Compare net return, MFE and MAE, not win rate alone.

policy_feasibility.interpretation: A large raw sample with zero current and reconstructed Direct Buy indicates that the setup generator and the ordered confirmation gates do not overlap. Review the first zero-survival gate before changing thresholds.
